mano_cua.result_summary: mano-cua 15步验证：在Script Lab编辑器输入console.log(null)/console.log(undefined)/console.log(0)后点击Run，Runner页面(localhost:3200)崩溃显示TypeError。CustomTailoredObjectInspector组件在render方法中直接访问obj.toJSON而未做null检查，当console.log(null)传入null时触发TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'toJSON')。正常应显示null输出，实际Runner完全崩溃。
